description: A lively chibi desktop pet based on 鹿弈Nui.

actionNotes.run_right: Drag-only right-facing running variant; smoothed to 24 frames at 30 fps on row 1.
actionNotes.run_left: Drag-only left-facing running variant; smoothed to 24 frames at 30 fps on row 3.
actionNotes.slide_stop_right: Physics-only right-facing release animation, split onto row 2 and smoothed to 24 frames at 30 fps for horizontal inertia braking.
actionNotes.slide_stop_left: Physics-only left-facing release animation, split onto row 4 and smoothed to 24 frames at 30 fps for horizontal inertia braking.
actionNotes.diagonal_pounce_right: Physics-only rightward diagonal release pounce, split onto row 15 and smoothed to 24 frames at 30 fps.
actionNotes.diagonal_pounce_left: Physics-only leftward diagonal release pounce, split onto row 16 and smoothed to 24 frames at 30 fps without runtime mirroring.
actionNotes.diagonal_pounce_land_right: Physics-only rightward diagonal pounce landing completion, split onto row 17 and smoothed to 24 frames at 30 fps.
actionNotes.diagonal_pounce_land_left: Physics-only leftward diagonal pounce landing completion, split onto row 18 and smoothed to 24 frames at 30 fps.
actionNotes.sit: Generated v0.2.1 replacement row for the missing sitting animation.
actionNotes.sleep: Dedicated v0.2.3 prone sleep row with a small attached Z cue and a longer closed-eye hold.
actionNotes.fall: Physics-only airborne falling row, split onto row 19 and smoothed to 32 frames at 30 fps.
actionNotes.fall_land: Physics-only impact row, split onto row 20 and smoothed to 32 frames at 30 fps.
actionNotes.fall_getup: Physics-only prone-to-standing get-up row, split onto row 21 and smoothed to 32 frames at 30 fps.
actionNotes.idle_alt: Former wake row; visually closer to a second idle action.
actionNotes.walk: Light jog row smoothed to 24 frames at 30 fps with synchronized motionX offsets.
actionNotes.think: Former blink row; visually closer to thinking with a longer closed-eye hold.
actionNotes.idle_long: Former breathe row; retained for compatibility but removed from menu and idle pools.
actionNotes.nod: Former stretch row; blank trailing frames removed and hand gesture smoothed to 12 frames.
actionNotes.idle_blink: Alias to the single retained thinking action.
